div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, November 9, 1942—3 p.m.
[Received 4:11 p.m.]

div.p: 4633. Department’s 3410, November 5, midnight. Ribeiro Dantas, president of Condor, reports that he is making every effort to conclude his negotiations covering points 1, 2 and 3 mentioned in the Department’s telegram under reference by Wednesday evening. Sampaio promises to give his decision as soon as he can see Air Minister (he hopes) today.Paulo Sampaio, a shareholder in Condor, was considering the offer of one of the three directorships in the new arrangement. Dantas believes and the Embassy concurs, that a special announcement would be desirable.
